CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 On April 15, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Steven B. Effres, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Andrew Roa. Also present, Adelaide Roa, Guardian ad Litem. The Court hears evidence and grants compromise as follows: $25,000.00, Attorney Fees: $6,250.00 amd $18,750.00 to be deposited for each of the three minors into a blocked account at Bank of America, 12221 E. Artesia Blvd., Cerritas, CA 90703. Order signed in open court.
